events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: this is a **fail / critical risk** condition — an anchor point with an unverified, "guessed" 5,000-lb rating and no qualified-person certification is being used for active fall arrest work, which violates 1926.502(d)(15)/1910.140(c)(13). Immediate action is to stop use, tag it out, and get a qualified person to verify/certify the anchor (or the engineered 2x safety-factor alternative) before resuming.
